title: LumenReceiptV2
description: Canonical v2 execution fairness receipt for Jito bundle transactions on Solana. v2 binds transaction context and EQS execution quality into a SHA-256 receipt hash anchored through the Solana memo program.

receiptId.description: Stable Lumen receipt identifier generated by the issuer. This ID is used for lookup, webhook idempotency, and public verifier URLs.

txSignature.description: Base58 Solana transaction signature for the transaction being stamped.

bundleId.description: Jito bundle ID whose confirmed bundle metadata contains txSignature.

slot.description: Solana slot in which the Jito bundle landed, as returned by Jito bundle status metadata.

confirmationStatus.description: Confirmation status of the landed bundle at the time the receipt was issued.

receiptHash.description: Lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 digest of the canonical v2 pre-image: txSignature, bundleId, slot, executionQuality.score, executionQuality.flagsBitmap, and executionQuality.algoVersion joined by byte 0x1f.

onChainMemo.description: Solana transaction signature of the memo-program anchor that stores receiptHash, or null if the receipt has not been anchored yet.

attestationLevel.description: Attestation tier for the execution evidence. BUNDLE_VERIFIED is backed by Jito bundle status; BAM_ATTESTED is reserved for future Jito BAM TEE digest support.

walletAddress.description: Optional base58 Solana wallet address associated with the stamped transaction, or null when the issuer did not provide one.

verified.description: Issuer-side verification marker. Independent verifiers should still recompute receiptHash and check the memo anchor.

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the receipt was created.

schemaVersion.description: Receipt schema version. Current Lumen-compliant EQS receipts use v2.

executionQuality.description: Deterministic Execution Quality Score data bound into the v2 receipt hash.

score.description: Execution Quality Score from 0 to 100 after applying EQS v1 penalties and bonuses.

flags.description: Human-readable EQS v1 flag identifiers. The array must be consistent with flagsBitmap during verification.

flagsBitmap.description: Canonical deterministic bitmap derived from flags. Bit 0 is BACKRUN_SUSPECTED and bit 9 is TAIL_POSITION, following alphabetical flag order.

algoVersion.description: Execution quality algorithm version used to compute score, flags, and flagsBitmap.

sandwichDetected.description: Deprecated compatibility field from pre-EQS analysis. New integrations should use executionQuality.flags instead.

frontRunDetected.description: Deprecated compatibility field from pre-EQS analysis. New integrations should use executionQuality.flags instead.

analysisRanAt.description: Deprecated compatibility timestamp for legacy analysis jobs. New integrations should use createdAt and executionQuality.
